error_signature: The operation was aborted due to timeout
title: SearXNG node timeout error
symptom: When executing a workflow with the SearXNG node, n8n throws 'The operation was aborted due to timeout' after 5 seconds.
not_this_if: The node works without timeout when not using host networking
root_cause: The timeout error occurs because the SearXNG node is unable to connect to the specified URL within the default timeout period. This can happen due to network configuration issues, especially when using Docker without proper network settings.
fix_steps: Run the n8n container with the --network host option
Test the SearXNG node again to see if the timeout issue is resolved
agent_instruction: Run the n8n container with the --network host option to resolve the timeout issue.
